info.title: Book Store Litera API
info.description: RESTful API for the Litera online book store application built with Node.js, Express, Prisma ORM, and MongoDB.

note.example: Please pack carefully, this is a gift

comment.example: Still a good book after re-reading.

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: Login, register, and logout for Admin and User

tags.name: Admin Management
tags.description: Admin profile and CRUD management (Superadmin only for CRUD)

tags.name: Books
tags.description: Book CRUD, book images, filtering, and recommendations

tags.name: Address
tags.description: User address management and regional data (RajaOngkir)

tags.name: Orders
tags.description: Checkout, Midtrans payment, and order management

post.summary: Register new user with email and password
User login with email and password

get.summary: Get admin detail by ID (Superadmin only)

403.description: Password change is not allowed for Google account

get.summary: Get books with filter and sorting
Get all images of a book

post.summary: Add image to a book (Admin only)

get.summary: Get book image detail by ID

delete.summary: Delete address (primary address cannot be deleted)

get.summary: Get all orders with pagination (Admin only)
Get order detail by ID (Admin only)

post.summary: Checkout and get Midtrans payment token
Midtrans payment webhook (called by Midtrans server, not client)
post.description: This endpoint is called by Midtrans server to send payment notifications. Transaction status values: capture, settlement, pending, deny, cancel, expire.

403.description: You can only update your own order

get.summary: Get all reviews for a book (Public)
Get all reviews by logged-in user

403.description: You can only review books you have purchased

409.description: You have already reviewed this book

403.description: You can only update your own review
You can only delete your own review

get.summary: Get order statistics by status and monthly trend (Admin only)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of top products to retrieve
